hooks.command:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
# 위험 명령 차단
CMD="$TOOL_INPUT_COMMAND"
if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'rm\s+(-rf|-r\s+-f|-f\s+-r)\s+(/|~|\$HOME)'; then
  echo '❌ BLOCKED: Dangerous rm command targeting / or ~' >&2
  exit 2
fi
if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'git\s+push\s+.*--force'; then
  echo '❌ BLOCKED: Force push is not allowed' >&2
  exit 2
fi
exit 0

#!/usr/bin/env bash
if command -v git &>/dev/null && git rev-parse --git-dir &>/dev/null 2>&1; then
  CHANGED=$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
  if [[ "$CHANGED" -gt 0 ]]; then
    echo "⚠️ 미커밋 변경 ${CHANGED}건 있음 — /commit 확인 필요" >&2
  fi
fi
exit 0
